# Isnanto Budi - Full-Stack & Mobile Developer

Isnanto Budi Nurrahman is a Software Engineer, Full-Stack Developer, and Mobile Developer based in Jakarta, Indonesia. He specializes in high-performance web applications, SaaS multi-tenant architectures, and premium mobile experiences using Vue.js, Angular, Flutter, and Go.

## Core Expertise
- **Frontend**: Vue.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, SaaS Multi-tenant architecture
- **Mobile**: Flutter, React Native
- **Design**: Modern, interactive UI with dark mode, glassmorphism, and smooth animations.

## Key Projects
- **TenantMaster**: A multi-tenant cloud application for enterprise management.
- **Insurance App**: Modern mobile solution for the insurance industry.
- **IB Portofolio**: A high-end developer portfolio with interactive spotlights and 3D effects.

## Contact & Links
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/IsnantoBudi
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/isnanto-budi/
- **Website**: https://www.isnantobudi.online/
